title: Data Product Manager - Marketing Analytics (f/m/d)
required_skills: 8+ years analytics experience with 3+ years team leadership — HARD SENIORITY REQUIREMENT
MMM (Media Mix Modelling), attribution, and incrementality testing — hands-on depth
Product mindset: define data products with owners, users, success metrics, lifecycles
Portfolio & programme discipline across multiple concurrent initiatives
Executive presence and VP/C-level stakeholder communication
bonus_skills: Marketing tech and AdTech stack fluency
matched_skills: Marketing analytics background (IPC ROI analysis, GRG campaign performance, Moli Media e-commerce analytics)
Data storytelling and C-level communication (HSBC: C-suite programme reports)
Programme analytics: multi-dimensional dashboards, KPI frameworks, burn-rate reporting
Cross-functional coordination across analytics and business teams
Power BI PL-300 + Qlik Sense — BI tooling credential
E-commerce funnel analytics (Moli Media 4,000+ attendee live-stream events)
missing_skills: 8+ years experience — HARD GAP (4+ years actual)
3+ years team leadership — HARD GAP (no team management experience in CV)
MMM / media mix modelling — HARD GAP (not in CV or toolset)
Attribution modelling at senior/methodology level — HARD GAP
Data product ownership with lifecycle management — not demonstrated
Senior programme discipline at executive level — current experience is working-student / junior level
core_responsibilities: Own marketing analytics domain end-to-end: roadmap, prioritisation, stakeholder alignment
Senior measurement authority: MMM, attribution, incrementality
Lead and grow marketing analytics team (analysts, data scientists, engineers)
Partner with marketing leadership on investment decisions, performance reviews, campaign analytics
Portfolio discipline: scope, risk, dependencies, executive visibility

company_info.size_raw: ZEAL Network SE — Germany's largest online lottery provider (LOTTO24, Tipp24), Hamburg
